title: Sale Pending- 9 FedEx P&D Routes- Condensed South Kansas City, MO
reasonForSelling: Selling to consolidate businesses in other terminals
supportTraining: The current manager will stay with the business and the business owner is willing to help the new owners get up and running for a smooth transition.
description:
The contracted service area (CSA) consists of 3 zip codes in Southeast KC. CSA is approximately 20 minutes from the terminal and near major highways (maintenance costs and travel time for drivers are lower than average) and comprises primarily heavily condensed residential deliveries. 80% of the stops are e-commerce (generally smaller packages and fewer businesses than other CSAs). These routes would be ideal for an owner-operator that is wanting to get into FedEx or a semi-absentee owner looking to add an operation that provides consistent cash flow to their portfolio. Currently, the business has 12 employees including a full-time manager that will stay with the business. The entire business is for sale (including 14 trucks, scanners, uniforms, tires, parts, etc.) and would be eligible for SBA funding. Seller is willing to owner finance a portion of the sale for the right buyers.

Ad#:2276327
